creator: davidx@viasoft.com.cn
text:
under system console, at first virtual console screen, if I move mouse cursor to left bottom corner, mouse cursor will flicker very fast, I need't do anything, there isn't any busy process, CPU idle time become
%82.

Fix: 

don't know, but I think FreeBSD's mouse driver seems weird, from 4.0 to 4.2, the bug is still there. it is very annoying.
